docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BETA NINETIES COMPUTER INC AS TO DEFENDANT REMING INFORMATION SYSTEMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTFD.MAIL TO WILLIAM VILLAGOMEZ -REMING INFORM. RETURNED SIGNED;
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-15-1999, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JUL-02-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-02-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-29-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE SETTLEMENT NO APPEARANCES NECESSARY ON 12/29/99 & THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THE ACTION AN ADDITIONAL FIVE MONTHS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-29-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-07-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES NECESSARY ON 6/7/00, AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE CASE WITH PRJUDICE.
PLTF'S CONTINUANCE REQUEST RCVD. INFO MAILED RE: $10.00 FILING FEE;
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-07-2000, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAR-16-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETA NINETIES COMPUTER INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REMING INFORMATION SYSTEMS $3,387.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,413.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $800.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT REMING INFORMATION SYSTEMS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT REMING INFORMATION SYSTEMS
PLTF'S DECL:REMOVE OLD ADDRESS&CHNGE TO CURRENT MAILING ADDRESS.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT REMING INFORMATION SYSTEMS
